column4: 3200 pulses/rev * 3:1 / 360. Fixed mechanical ratio. Set value to 26.66667 after import.
Motor 0 homing speed, steps/s, SIGNED toward the prox. Set ~-2000, tune sign+magnitude at commissioning.
Motor 1 homing speed, steps/s, SIGNED toward the prox. Shoulders often home opposite ways; set ~2000, tune.
Left switch angle * STEPS_PER_DEG so ActualLeftDeg reads ~135.85 after homing. Set at commissioning.
Right switch angle * STEPS_PER_DEG so ActualRightDeg reads ~44.15 after homing. Set at commissioning.
Motor 0 EM806 ALM. After import, change this to an ALIAS of the ClearLink digital input the drive alarm is wired to.
Motor 1 EM806 ALM. After import, change this to an ALIAS of the ClearLink digital input the drive alarm is wired to.
Vision-PC handshake surface (pycomm3 reads/writes by name). Import the VisionRobot UDT .L5X files first so this type resolves.
